why_winner: Variant A leads with the most quotable, screenshot-able line in the draft pool and carries the clearest contrast structure. The capability-vs-infrastructure frame is the core intellectual payload and A delivers it first, without setup. Highest combined score at 8.4.

runner_up_notes.B: B's best line is 'Day one. Still feels weird to watch.' — it is the most authentic and human moment in the entire draft pool. Insert it into the winner between '/loop changed that for me.' and the CTA question. Adds 38 chars; revised tweet stays under 280.

issues.description: Variant A is the strongest hook and frame but reads slightly abstract — 'for me' is the only personal grounding. The post is about a live day-one experiment; it should feel like one.
issues.action: Add 'Day one. Still feels weird to watch.' from Variant B between '/loop changed that for me.' and the CTA. No other changes.
